purpose: Define clear, unambiguous meaning of every action/status label in the ILMA autonomous learning system.

COMPLETED.description: Action completed successfully with valid artifact. Judge verdict is PASS. No warnings. No errors.

COMPLETED_WITH_WARN.description: Action completed with valid artifact. Judge verdict is WARN. Warning is non-blocking (score >= warn_threshold). Artifact is usable.
COMPLETED_WITH_WARN.note: WARN with score >= warn_threshold means artifact is acceptable with documented warning. This is valid for production readiness.

BLOCKED_SAFE.description: Action was blocked by scope/safety boundary. Not a failure — the system correctly prevented an unsafe action.
BLOCKED_SAFE.note: BLOCKED_SAFE is a positive outcome — safety system worked correctly.

PARTIAL.description: Action partially completed with some evidence gaps. Artifact exists but incomplete. Judge may have WARN or partial FAIL.
PARTIAL.note: PARTIAL is acceptable for production if gaps are documented and non-blocking.

FAILED.description: Action failed. No valid artifact produced. Judge verdict is FAIL.
FAILED.note: FAILED means real failure — judge rejected artifact, revision not sufficient.

ERROR.description: Runtime exception occurred. Action did not complete normally. Must be blocking.
ERROR.note: ERROR means system failure, not user-facing outcome. Must be fixed before production.

DIRECT_EXECUTE.description: Task class did not require evolution loop. Executed directly.
DIRECT_EXECUTE.note: This is fine — not all tasks need the evolution loop.

UNKNOWN.description: Status not yet determined. Should not persist to final trace.

forbidden_mappings.Judge WARN → ERROR: WARN is not ERROR. ERROR means exception, not judge verdict.
forbidden_mappings.WARN without artifact → COMPLETED: Must have artifact to be COMPLETED.
forbidden_mappings.IndexError in lesson storage → ERROR: Lesson storage exception should not change action status. Action already had PASS_WITH_WARN.
forbidden_mappings.reflection[] but iteration>1 → ERROR: Must check reflections before accessing index. Do not convert index error to ERROR.

READY_FOR_120_MINUTE_PILOT.note: COMPLETED_WITH_WARN allowed if WARN is non-blocking and artifact valid.

PARTIAL.note: Used when there are WARNINGS or PARTIAL outcomes that need documentation but are not fatal.

NOT_READY.condition: Any ERROR present, or >1 FAILED, or no artifact produced for required actions

lesson_storage_rules.rule_1: Store lesson AFTER final_status is set and stable.
lesson_storage_rules.rule_3: Lesson storage exception must NOT overwrite final_status.
lesson_storage_rules.rule_4: Lesson storage failure is non-fatal — log but do not change action outcome.
lesson_storage_rules.rule_5: Lesson storage should run ONLY when final_status is PASS, PASS_WITH_WARN, or FAILED (not ERROR).
